arts.ttl: Mark Robins explains Stoke City's Wouter Burger transfer call
arts.sum: “For me, at that stage, it would have been really difficult to replace anybody in the squad and this is somebody that’s played since I’ve come in all the games I think. Mark Robins says Wouter Burger is “a really important player” for Stoke City after the club turned down interest late in the January window.

Stoke ended a three-game winless run with a hard-fought 2-1 victory at Hull last time out. The Potters are unbeaten in three at home, though have won only one of their last eight in front of their own...

arts.ttl: ‘Will edge it’ – Stoke City vs Cardiff City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Stoke City vs Cardiff City prediction ahead of the FA Cup clash on Saturday. The post ‘Will edge it’ – Stoke City vs Cardiff City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton predicts thumping Stoke City vs Cardiff scoreline 'to rub mate's nose in it'
arts.sum: Chris Sutton is predicting his old Norwich teammate Mark Robins to oversee a huge Stoke City win over Cardiff in the FA Cup fourth round this weekend. Stoke are 18th in the Championship and on the back of a 2-1 win at Hull last week which gave Mark Robins - Sutton's old Norwich City teammate - his first league win as manager.

arts.ttl: Stoke City set to start consultation over club badge
arts.sum: An update from the latest meeting of Connect said: "The club will commence the process of consulting supporters about the future of the crest in the coming weeks. The club has been liaising with the new Stoke City Connect panel, a group of fan representatives, about the possibility of change and the process will now be opened out to the wider fan base.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey poised to return for Stoke City clash as two Cardiff City players ruled out
arts.sum: After being side-lined with a hamstring injury incurred while on international duty with Wales back in September, the ex-Arsenal and Juventus star now aims to build on his four appearances for Cardiff this season, but manager Omer Riza made clear the veteran midfielder is available for selection at Stoke. He has just had really bad luck with injuries, not being able to sustain long periods of playing.

arts.ttl: All change as Mark Robins prepares for emotional return to Coventry City with Stoke
arts.sum: Stoke won the reverse fixture 1-0 on the opening day of the season when Robins was in charge of the Sky Blues and Steven Schumacher was in the home dugout at the bet365 Stadium. Robins, sacked by the Sky Blues in November after seven years in charge, takes the Potters to the CBS Arena on March 8, with the game now kicking off at 12.30pm instead of 3pm to accommodate TV coverage.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey to make Cardiff City return after five months as duo ruled out of Stoke City clash
arts.sum: The Bluebirds boss spoke ahead of the FA Cup clash with Stoke City this weekend
